title: Python Developer
responsibilities:
Develop, test, and maintain high-quality Python code for back-end services.

Debug existing applications and troubleshoot performance bottlenecks.

Collaborate with senior engineers to implement functional requirements and system designs.

Integrate third-party APIs and manage data storage solutions.

Write unit tests to ensure code robustness and reliability.

Participate in code reviews to learn best practices and maintain coding standards.

Document technical specifications and internal processes for better team alignment.
recruiter_notes: I want some one who also projects with python and also trained AI Models
